expectations.text: Agent reads tracker.html and identifies task #42 as the next task
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows parsed tracker table, identified #42 as critical priority. Also identified #46 as dependency and built it first.

expectations.text: Agent builds backend endpoint before frontend screen for fullstack tasks
expectations.evidence: Built task #46 (backend household summary) first, then #42 (frontend partner dashboard). Correctly followed fullstack ordering.

expectations.text: Agent runs compilation checks after building code
expectations.evidence: Transcript mentions verification of backend code patterns and frontend TypeScript compilation.

expectations.text: Agent updates the tracker status when a task is complete
expectations.evidence: Both task #46 and #42 updated to status:done in tracker.html with completion notes.

expectations.text: Agent announces which task it is starting before beginning work
expectations.evidence: Clear announcements: 'Starting task #46: Household summary/stats endpoint' and 'TASK #42: Partner Dashboard View'.
